description_long: This cabin features a rustic exterior with vertical wood paneling that has a striped, natural finish, giving it a cozy, woodland appearance. The main structure is topped with a steep, dark gable roof, while an attached side extension has a lower, sloped roof in a lighter tone. The front facade includes a single wooden door and a large rectangular window, both framed in wood, providing a welcoming entryway and ample natural light. A round window is visible on one gable end, and a metal chimney pipe with a cap protrudes from the roof, suggesting a wood stove or fireplace inside. The cabin sits on a simple rectangular footprint with a slightly asymmetrical layout due to the side extension. The overall design is compact and functional, suitable for residential or retreat use in an urban or semi-urban setting.
description: A rustic, wood-paneled cabin with a steep gable roof, large front window, and a side extension, featuring a metal chimney and natural, striped wood textures.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance door, a large rectangular window, and the prominent gable roof with the side extension visible to the left.
description_view_1: Gable end view displaying the round window, the metal chimney pipe, and the striped wood paneling, with the roof's pitch clearly visible.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the back of the main cabin and the side extension, with the chimney pipe and the roof's varying heights.
description_view_3: Opposite gable end view showing a large window and the full expanse of the dark gable roof, with the side extension receding to the right.
attribute_roof_type: gable roof with a secondary shed roof extension, both clad in textured material with a visible metal chimney pipe
attribute_window_arrangement: one large rectangular window on the front facade, one large rectangular window on the rear, and a single round window on one gable end; windows are asymmetrically distributed
attribute_door_placement: one single door located on the front facade, offset to the left of the main window
